mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_POST_INFO P WHERE P.board_id = #{boardId} AND P.post_use_yn = 'Y'
AND P.post_status = #{postStatus}
AND P.post_title LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
AND P.post_content LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
AND P.reg_nm LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
AND (P.post_title LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR P.post_content LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR P.reg_nm LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND P.extra_col1 LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
AND P.extra_col2 LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
AND P.reg_id = #{userId}

SELECT P.*, B.board_title, B.status_use_yn, B.editor_use_yn, B.reply_yn, B.secret_use_yn FROM TB_POST_INFO P JOIN TB_BOARD_INFO B ON P.board_id = B.board_id WHERE P.post_seq = #{postSeq} AND P.board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POST_INFO ( board_id, post_title, post_content, reg_id, reg_nm, reg_ip, reg_dt, post_status, post_use_yn, secret_yn, notice_yn, read_cnt, oppose_cnt, approve_cnt ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{regId}, #{regNm}, #{regIp}, GETDATE(), #{postStatus}, 'Y', #{secretYn}, #{noticeYn}, 0, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POST_INFO SET post_title = #{postTitle}, post_content = #{postContent}, secret_yn = #{secretYn}, notice_yn = #{noticeYn}, notice_begin_dt = #{noticeBeginDt}, notice_end_dt = #{noticeEndDt}, extra_col1 = #{extraCol1}, extra_col2 = #{extraCol2}, extra_col3 = #{extraCol3}, extra_col4 = #{extraCol4}, extra_col5 = #{extraCol5} WHERE post_seq = #{postSeq} AND board_id = #{boardId}
UPDATE TB_POST_INFO SET read_cnt = read_cnt + 1 WHERE post_seq = #{postSeq} AND board_id = #{boardId}
UPDATE TB_POST_INFO SET post_use_yn = 'N' WHERE post_seq = #{postSeq} AND board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT reply_seq, board_id, post_seq, upper_reply_seq, reply_title, reply_content, reply_nm, work_dt, reg_id, reg_nm, reg_dt, reply_status, secret_yn FROM TB_POST_REPLY_INFO WHERE post_seq = #{postSeq} AND board_id = #{boardId} AND reply_use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY reply_seq ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POST_REPLY_INFO ( board_id, post_seq, upper_reply_seq, reply_title, reply_content, reply_nm, work_dt, reg_id, reg_nm, reg_ip, reg_dt, reply_status, reply_use_yn, secret_yn ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{postSeq}, #{upperReplySeq}, #{replyTitle}, #{replyContent}, #{replyNm}, #{workDt}, #{regId}, #{regNm}, #{regIp}, GETDATE(), #{replyStatus}, 'Y', #{secretYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POST_REPLY_INFO SET reply_use_yn = 'N' WHERE reply_seq = #{replySeq} AND board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT file_seq, board_id, post_seq, file_nm, file_path, file_size, download_cnt, file_ext, thumb_path, file_type FROM TB_POST_FILE_INFO WHERE post_seq = #{postSeq} AND board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY file_seq ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_POST_FILE_INFO WHERE file_seq = #{fileSeq} AND board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POST_FILE_INFO SET download_cnt = download_cnt + 1 WHERE file_seq = #{fileSeq}
